title: Fur-hood & lyric denim
note: Black oversized zip hoodie with fur-lined hood; wide black denim with full-column white type; chunky soles — dark 2000s street silhouette.

title: Engraved knit & maxi denim
note: Cream knit with large black classical graphics; long dark denim with pink tribal side panels; technical silver backpack and high-top stacked sneakers.

title: Tribal jersey & JNCO denim
note: Burgundy pinstripe jersey with heavy tribal skull art front and cyber-gothic back print; faux-fur trapper hat with star; faded ultra-wide blue jeans with side tribal panels; platform lug boots — not the same as a minimal opium fit, more neo-tribal / late-Y2K energy.

title: Leather stack & spiked bag
note: Cropped black leather bomber over hood; distressed blue denim with extra layered / cargo-leg volume; black platform footwear; neon pink spiked backpack as the single high-vis pop — maximal dark street, not summer or gorpcore.

title: Palm shirt & boombox
note: Yellow palm-print short-sleeve shirt, knee cargo shorts, Rasta-striped beanie, flip-flops, silver boombox prop — relaxed 90s–2000s beach / hip-hop summer; intentionally not opium or dark street.

title: Leaf shirt & fishing rod
note: Burnt-orange tropical leaf button shirt, tan wide cargos, black bucket hat and blackout shades, sage foam clogs, fishing rod prop — outdoorsy ironic summer; different from the boombox look (more gorp / leisure than retro boombox hip-hop).
